function_v0.doc: Initialize the vault with underlying token, supply yearly rate, borrow yearly rate, and admin\nRates are scaled by 1e6 (e.g., 10% = 100_000)
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Admin: set boosted vault address (DeFindex).
function_v0.name: set_boosted_vault

function_v0.doc: View: get boosted vault (if set)
function_v0.name: get_boosted_vault

function_v0.doc: Admin: set target idle cash buffer in basis points (0..=10_000).
function_v0.name: set_idle_cash_buffer_bps

function_v0.doc: View: get target idle cash buffer in basis points.
function_v0.name: get_idle_cash_buffer_bps

function_v0.doc:
Pull the specified amount of underlying from the boosted vault into idle cash.
Call this before a large withdraw to pre-fund idle cash so the withdrawal
transaction itself does not need to call the boosted vault (avoiding budget limits).
No auth required \xe2\x80\x94 pulling into the vault is always beneficial.
function_v0.name: prepare_liquidity

function_v0.doc: Permissionless: refresh the cached boosted-underlying value from live DeFindex data.\nCall this from a keeper/rebalance bot after each rebalance so that `update_interest`\nuses a fresh value without paying the DeFindex call cost on every user transaction.
function_v0.name: refresh_boosted_underlying

function_v0.doc: Admin: move excess live cash into boosted vault to match target buffer.
function_v0.name: rebalance_idle_cash

function_v0.doc: Deposit tokens into the vault and receive pTokens
function_v0.name: deposit

function_v0.doc: Withdraw tokens using pTokens
function_v0.name: withdraw

function_v0.doc: Get user's balance in the vault in underlying terms (pTokens \xc3\x97 exchange rate)
function_v0.name: get_user_balance

function_v0.doc: Get user's pToken balance
function_v0.name: get_ptoken_balance

function_v0.doc: Return (ptoken_balance, borrow_balance, exchange_rate, underlying_token) in one call.\nPeridottroller uses this in account-health loops to replace 4 cross-contract reads with 1.
function_v0.name: get_account_snapshot

function_v0.doc: Get total amount deposited in the vault
function_v0.name: get_total_deposited

function_v0.doc: Get total pTokens issued
function_v0.name: get_total_ptokens

function_v0.doc: Admin: stage a timelocked contract upgrade.
function_v0.name: propose_upgrade_wasm

function_v0.doc: Admin: execute a staged upgrade once timelock has elapsed.
function_v0.name: upgrade_wasm

function_v0.doc: Admin: transfer admin to new address
function_v0.name: set_admin

function_v0.doc: Get the exchange rate (pToken to underlying ratio) scaled by 1e6
function_v0.name: get_exchange_rate

function_v0.doc: Get the underlying token address
function_v0.name: get_underlying_token

function_v0.doc: Get collateral factor (scaled 1e6)
function_v0.name: get_collateral_factor

function_v0.doc: Admin: set peridottroller address
function_v0.name: set_peridottroller

function_v0.doc: Admin: set or clear margin controller address used for collateral lock checks.
function_v0.name: set_margin_controller

function_v0.doc: Admin: set interest rate model address
function_v0.name: set_interest_model

function_v0.doc: Admin: explicitly enable static-rate mode when no external model is used.
function_v0.name: enable_static_rates

function_v0.doc: Admin: set reserve factor (0..=1e6)
function_v0.name: set_reserve_factor

function_v0.doc: Admin: set admin fee factor (0..=1e6)
function_v0.name: set_admin_fee

function_v0.doc: Admin: set flash loan fee (0..=1e6, applied to principal)
function_v0.name: set_flash_loan_fee

function_v0.doc: Admin: set supply cap (0 disables)
function_v0.name: set_supply_cap

function_v0.doc: Admin: set borrow cap (0 disables)
function_v0.name: set_borrow_cap

function_v0.doc: Get total reserves
function_v0.name: get_total_reserves

function_v0.doc: Get total admin fees
function_v0.name: get_total_admin_fees

function_v0.doc: Admin: reduce reserves and transfer to admin
function_v0.name: reduce_reserves

function_v0.doc: Admin: reduce admin fees and transfer to admin
function_v0.name: reduce_admin_fees

function_v0.doc: Update interest based on elapsed time and current per-second rate
function_v0.name: update_interest

function_v0.doc: Admin-only recovery for missing core state after TTL expiry.\nSets missing rate/index/time fields to safe defaults.
function_v0.name: recover_state

function_v0.doc: Get total underlying
function_v0.name: get_total_underlying

function_v0.doc: Admin: update yearly interest rate (scaled 1e6). Applies after accruing with old rate.
function_v0.name: set_interest_rate

function_v0.doc: Admin: update borrow yearly rate (scaled 1e6)
function_v0.name: set_borrow_rate

function_v0.doc: Admin: set collateral factor (0..=1e6)
function_v0.name: set_collateral_factor

function_v0.doc: Read admin
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc: Get user's current borrow balance (principal adjusted by index)
function_v0.name: get_user_borrow_balance

function_v0.doc: Get current borrow balance for a margin position namespace.
function_v0.name: get_margin_borrow_balance

function_v0.doc: Permissionless TTL extension for position-scoped margin borrow state.
function_v0.name: bump_margin_borrow_ttl

function_v0.doc: Admin recovery path for a missing/expired margin-position borrow snapshot.
function_v0.name: recover_margin_borrow_snapshot

function_v0.doc: Permissionless TTL extension for per-user borrow state.\nKeepers can call this periodically for active borrowers.
function_v0.name: bump_user_borrow_ttl

function_v0.doc: Admin recovery path for a missing/expired borrower snapshot.\nIntended for keeper-assisted repair after TTL expiry.
function_v0.name: recover_user_borrow_snapshot

function_v0.doc: Get available liquidity = total_underlying - total_borrowed

function_v0.doc: Get total borrowed outstanding
function_v0.name: get_total_borrowed

function_v0.doc: Get user's collateral value in underlying terms

function_v0.doc: Borrow tokens against pToken collateral

function_v0.doc: Borrow into a margin position namespace.\nCallable only by the configured margin controller.
function_v0.name: init_margin_borrow_state

function_v0.doc: Borrow into a margin position namespace.\nCallable only by the configured margin controller.
function_v0.name: borrow_for_margin

function_v0.doc: Repay borrowed tokens
function_v0.name: repay

function_v0.doc: Repay debt tracked in a margin position namespace.\nCallable only by the configured margin controller.
function_v0.name: repay_for_margin

function_v0.doc: Execute a flash loan to `receiver`. Receiver must return `amount + fee` within the callback.
function_v0.name: flash_loan

function_v0.doc: Repay on behalf during liquidation; only callable by peridottroller/peridottroller
function_v0.name: repay_on_behalf

function_v0.doc: Seize pTokens from borrower to liquidator; only callable by peridottroller/peridottroller

udt_union_v0.doc:
Hook types for modular compliance system.

Each hook type represents a specific event or validation point
where compliance modules can be executed.
udt_union_v0.name: ComplianceHook

void_v0.doc: Called after tokens are successfully transferred from one wallet to\nanother. Modules registered for this hook can update their state\nbased on transfer events.
void_v0.name: Transferred

void_v0.doc: Called after tokens are successfully created/minted to a wallet.\nModules registered for this hook can update their state based on minting\nevents.
void_v0.name: Created

void_v0.doc: Called after tokens are successfully destroyed/burned from a wallet.\nModules registered for this hook can update their state based on burning\nevents.
void_v0.name: Destroyed

void_v0.doc:
Called during transfer validation to check if a transfer should be
allowed. Modules registered for this hook can implement transfer
restrictions. This is a READ-only operation and should not modify
state.
void_v0.name: CanTransfer

void_v0.doc:
Called during mint validation to check if a mint operation should be
allowed. Modules registered for this hook can implement transfer
restrictions. This is a READ-only operation and should not modify
state.
void_v0.name: CanCreate

udt_union_v0.name: CountryRelation

udt_struct_v0.doc: A country data containing the country relationship and optional metadata
udt_struct_v0.name: CountryData

fields.doc: Optional metadata (e.g., visa type, validity period)
fields.name: metadata

udt_struct_v0.doc: Complete identity profile containing identity type and country data
udt_struct_v0.name: IdentityProfile

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the data associated with Identity Storage Registry.
udt_union_v0.name: IRSStorageKey

tuple_v0.doc: Maps account address to identity address
tuple_v0.name: Identity

tuple_v0.doc: Maps an account to its complete identity profile
tuple_v0.name: IdentityProfile

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Error codes for the Identity Registry Storage system.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: IRSError

cases.doc: An identity already exists for the given account.
cases.name: IdentityAlreadyExists

cases.doc: No identity found for the given account.
cases.name: IdentityNotFound

cases.doc: Country data not found at the specified index.
cases.name: CountryDataNotFound

cases.doc: Identity can't be with empty country data list.
cases.name: EmptyCountryList

cases.doc: The maximum number of country entries has been reached.
cases.name: MaxCountryEntriesReached

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an identity is stored for an account.
event_v0.name: IdentityStored

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an identity is removed from an account.
event_v0.name: IdentityUnstored

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an identity is modified for an account.
event_v0.name: IdentityModified

event_v0.doc: Event emitted for country data operations.
event_v0.name: CountryDataAdded

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the data associated with `RWA` token
udt_union_v0.name: IdentityVerifierStorageKey

void_v0.doc: Claim Topics and Issuers contract address
void_v0.name: ClaimTopicsAndIssuers

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the data associated with `RWA` token
udt_union_v0.name: RWAStorageKey

tuple_v0.doc: Frozen status of an address (true = frozen, false = not frozen)
tuple_v0.name: AddressFrozen

tuple_v0.doc: Amount of tokens frozen for a specific address
tuple_v0.name: FrozenTokens

udt_union_v0.doc:
Storage keys for the token binder system.

- Tokens are stored in buckets of 100 addresses each
- Each bucket is a `Vec<Address>` stored under its bucket index
- Total count is tracked separately
- When a token is unbound, the last token is moved to fill the gap
(swap-remove pattern)
udt_union_v0.name: TokenBinderStorageKey

tuple_v0.doc: Maps bucket index to a vector of token addresses (max 100 per bucket)
tuple_v0.name: TokenBucket

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Error codes for the Token Binder system.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: TokenBinderError

cases.doc: The specified token was not found in the bound tokens list.
cases.name: TokenNotFound

cases.doc: Attempted to bind a token that is already bound.
cases.name: TokenAlreadyBound

cases.doc: Total token capacity (MAX_TOKENS) has been reached.
cases.name: MaxTokensReached

cases.doc: Batch bind size exceeded.
cases.name: BindBatchTooLarge

cases.doc: The batch contains duplicates.
cases.name: BindBatchDuplicates

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a token is bound to the contract.
event_v0.name: TokenBound

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a token is unbound from the contract.
event_v0.name: TokenUnbound

cases.doc: Indicates an error related to insufficient balance for the operation.
cases.name: InsufficientBalance

cases.doc: Indicates an error when an input must be >= 0.
cases.name: LessThanZero

cases.doc: Indicates the address is frozen and cannot perform operations.
cases.name: AddressFrozen

cases.doc: Indicates insufficient free tokens (due to partial freezing).
cases.name: InsufficientFreeTokens

cases.doc: Indicates an identity cannot be verified.
cases.name: IdentityVerificationFailed

cases.doc: Indicates the transfer does not comply with the compliance rules.
cases.name: TransferNotCompliant

cases.doc: Indicates the mint operation does not comply with the compliance rules.
cases.name: MintNotCompliant

cases.doc: Indicates the compliance contract is not set.
cases.name: ComplianceNotSet

cases.doc: Indicates the onchain ID is not set.
cases.name: OnchainIdNotSet

cases.doc: Indicates the version is not set.
cases.name: VersionNotSet

cases.doc: Indicates the claim topics and issuers contract is not set.
cases.name: ClaimTopicsAndIssuersNotSet

cases.doc: Indicates the identity registry storage contract is not set.
cases.name: IdentityRegistryStorageNotSet

cases.doc: Indicates the identity verifier contract is not set.
cases.name: IdentityVerifierNotSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when token onchain ID is updated.
event_v0.name: TokenOnchainIdUpdated

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a recovery is successful.
event_v0.name: RecoverySuccess

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when an address is frozen or unfrozen.
event_v0.name: AddressFrozen

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when tokens are frozen.
event_v0.name: TokensFrozen

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when tokens are unfrozen.
event_v0.name: TokensUnfrozen

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when tokens are minted.
event_v0.name: Mint

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when tokens are burned.
event_v0.name: Burn

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when compliance contract is set.
event_v0.name: ComplianceSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when claim topics and issuers contract is set.
event_v0.name: ClaimTopicsAndIssuersSet

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when identity verifier contract is set.
event_v0.name: IdentityVerifierSet
